CustomField.description: Max date of Last Connected fields from the SaaS and Billing Primary Contacts and Account related to the CF record.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISBLANK(Primary_Contacts_Last_Connected__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.Onboarding_Last_Connected__c) ), NULL, DATE(1900, 01, 01) + MAX( BLANKVALUE(Primary_Contacts_Last_Connected__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) - DATE(1900, 01, 01), BLANKVALUE(Account__r.Onboarding_Last_Connected__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) - DATE(1900, 01, 01) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Max date of Last Connected fields from the SaaS and Billing Primary Contacts and Account related to the CF record.
CustomField.label: Onboarding Last Connected
